summary: Frontend-only testing of RFQ modal from Navbar and Supplier page color scheme update. All 11 test cases passed. RFQ modal opens correctly from Navbar on homepage and /collections page. Supplier page (/suppliers) color scheme successfully updated from green/emerald to blue (#2563EB).

issues: Success message container uses emerald/green (bg-emerald-900/30, bg-emerald-500) - this is intentional for success feedback UX pattern

passed_tests: Navbar 'Request Quote' button visible on homepage
Navbar 'Request Quote' button opens RFQ modal on homepage
RFQ modal has all required fields: Name, Phone, GST Number with Verify button, Company Name, Email, Fabric Type dropdown
RFQ modal close button (X) works correctly
Navbar 'Request Quote' button opens RFQ modal on /collections page
RFQ modal form submission works (POST /api/enquiries/rfq-lead) - success toast displayed
Supplier page (/suppliers) hero section uses blue theme (#2563EB)
Supplier page 'How Locofast Works' badge uses blue theme (bg-blue-50, text-blue-700)
Supplier page 'This IS For You If' section uses blue colors (bg-blue-900/30, border-blue-500/30, text-blue-400)
Supplier page bottom CTA 'Stop Waiting. Start Selling.' uses blue (#2563EB) background
Supplier page form 'Submit Application' button uses blue (#2563EB) when categories are selected
Supplier page form submission works (POST /api/enquiries) - 'Application Received' success message displayed
critical_code_review_comments: RFQModal.js correctly integrated into Navbar.js with state management (showRfq, setShowRfq)
Navbar renders RFQ modal at component level, making it accessible from any page

SellOnLocofast.js color scheme properly updated: hero badge (#2563EB/20), Apply button (#2563EB), 'This IS For You If' section (blue-900/30, blue-500/30, blue-400), bottom CTA (#2563EB), category buttons (#2563EB), submit button (#2563EB)
Form submission in SellOnLocofast.js correctly uses formData.contact_name (fixed from previous bug with form.contactName)
seed_data_creation: Test RFQ lead created (TEST_Playwright_User), Test supplier application created (TEST_Playwright_Mills)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RFQ modal from Navbar header fully tested and working on homepage and /collections page. Supplier page (/suppliers) color scheme updated from green/emerald to blue (#2563EB). All interactive elements use blue theme. Success state after form submission intentionally uses emerald/green for UX feedback pattern.

rfq_modal_from_navbar.success_indicator: Toast: 'Your enquiry has been submitted! Our team will reach out within 24 hours.'

color_verification_summary.note: Remaining emerald/green elements are intentional for success state feedback (Application Received confirmation)
